testCases.title: Preferred vendor invoice below threshold routes to finance
steps: Submit invoice INV-10421 for a preferred vendor.
Set invoice amount to USD 12,500.
Confirm no duplicate, tax, or compliance flags exist.
Run threshold-routing evaluation.
Review assigned queue and routing evidence.
testCases.expectedResult: Invoice routes to finance validation and records preferred vendor fast-path evidence.

testCases.title: High-value preferred vendor invoice requires manager approval
steps: Submit invoice INV-88450 for a preferred vendor.
Set invoice amount to USD 48,750.
Confirm no duplicate or tax exception flags exist.
Run threshold-routing evaluation.
Review assigned queue before finance validation.
testCases.expectedResult: Invoice routes to manager approval before it can proceed to finance validation.

testCases.title: Duplicate invoice override routes to manual review
steps: Submit invoice INV-44109 for a preferred vendor.
Set invoice amount to USD 8,900.
Set duplicate match score to 0.94.
Run exception evaluation before threshold routing.
Review assigned queue and override evidence.
testCases.expectedResult: Invoice routes to manual review and records duplicate override evidence.

testCases.title: Tax exception override blocks automated fast path
steps: Submit invoice INV-57222 for a preferred vendor.
Set invoice amount to USD 18,000.
Apply a tax exception flag.
Run exception evaluation and threshold routing.
Inspect final queue assignment.
testCases.expectedResult: Invoice routes to manual review and records tax exception override evidence.

testCases.title: Boundary invoice captures manager approval and audit evidence
steps: Submit invoice INV-25000 for a preferred vendor.
Set invoice amount to exactly USD 25,000.
Confirm no exception flags exist.
Run threshold-routing evaluation.
Review approval queue and audit evidence.
testCases.expectedResult: Invoice routes to manager approval and records threshold, vendor status, amount, and approval path.
